Unlike a box or basket, this peg bag hangs on the washing line, keeping pegs within reach. It also prevents pegs from collecting dust, moisture, or getting misplaced. How many pegs can this bag hold? The peg bag can hold up to 60 pegs, depending on their size. What features make this peg bag convenient for daily use? It has a wide opening for easy access, a secure hanging strap, and a lightweight design, making laundry more efficient. How should I clean and maintain my peg bag for long-term use? Simply wipe it with a damp cloth or hand wash it occasionally to remove dust and dirt, keeping it fresh and functional. Why should I invest in a peg bag instead of just keeping pegs in a drawer? A peg bag keeps pegs accessible, protects them from dirt, and makes laundry more efficient, saving time and hassle.
